quant_mix_note: Qwen3-8B-Q4_K_M is a mixed GGUF: ffn_down appears under BOTH Q4_K (G3 decode GEMV) and Q6_K (coop) across layers; lm_head is Q6_K; attention KV cache + prefill GEMM run fp16.

gpu.copy_gbps_note: 820 GB/s measured device-copy (scope PMS-R8 pin). The decode ceiling audit separately uses 960 peak / ~768 real for the weight-read roofline; 820 is the measured copy bandwidth used for profile-level planning.

thresholds.note: tiered_residual; SINGLE SOURCE for promotion thresholds. qk_candidate_evaluator.evaluate() loads these by profile_id; DEFAULT_THRESHOLDS is the matching code fallback (TIER_A 5%, TIER_B 2%).

new_target_bootstrap: to add a new <model>_<quant>_<gpu>: fill model/quant_mix/gpu/authority_contexts, derive role shapes from model dims (role_shape_derivation), then run the census (extra/pure_machine_search_default_path_census.py), the ceiling/attribution audit, and the candidate evaluator -- do NOT hand-edit route flags.
